dayTitle: Lost the Demurrer but still look fly!

photos.title: Suited Up With a City View
photos.caption: A portrait by the office window before heading out, city rooftops stretching out below.
photos.alt: Man in a tan suit and checked shirt smiling in front of a floor-to-ceiling office window overlooking a city street.

photos.title: Another Angle by the Window
photos.caption: A second shot from the same office window, catching the skyline from a different angle.
photos.alt: Man in a tan suit posing near a large office window with a city skyline visible outside.

photos.title: Walking It Off by the Water
photos.caption: After a long day, a relaxed moment on the waterfront promenade.
photos.alt: Man in a tan suit and red-and-white sneakers standing on a paved waterfront path with trees and water in the background.

photos.title: Another Look at the Waterfront
photos.caption: A second angle from the same waterfront walk, tie and all.
photos.alt: Man in a tan suit with a tie standing on a waterfront promenade, hands in pockets, smiling.

photos.title: All Smiles by the River
photos.caption: A candid, close-up smile from the same riverside stop.
photos.alt: Close-up portrait of a man in a tan suit smiling outdoors with trees and water behind him.

photos.title: Heading Out With Briefcase in Hand
photos.caption: Making an exit through a glass-walled lobby, briefcase in hand — the day's business concluded.
photos.alt: Man in a tan suit carrying a black briefcase, walking through a modern building lobby with escalators and glass walls.
